reason: Cursor reported GLM 5.2 High, but its cloud agent could not discover the public MCP tools because the fail-closed harness omitted Cursor's separate GET_MCP_TOOLS discovery primitive.

cursor.root_cause: RetriableError: required GET_MCP_TOOLS was absent from Cursor's allowed tool set.
cursor.score_treatment: not_run; raw zero rows are infrastructure failures and are excluded from model or full-system summaries

claude.observed_routing: Every request reported both claude-fable-5 and claude-opus-4-8; the runner rejected the fallback.

codex.score_treatment: engineering data only; not compared because the paired Cursor configuration did not reach the episode interface

remediation.harness_change: Allow mcp_tool_call plus the read-only get_mcp_tools_tool_call primitive; all filesystem, shell, browser, search, and subagent tools remain denied.
remediation.next_panel: All five v2 episodes are retired. A fresh, separately precommitted v3 panel is required for the three-system comparison.
